Without a Paddle (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $58,156,435Details
International Box Office $6,964,845
Worldwide Box Office $65,121,280
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,528,946 (23.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:89.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,730 opening theaters/2,756 max. theaters, 7.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $105,919,908

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 20th, 2004 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 19th, 2004 (Wide), released as Without A Paddle (Australia)
Video Release: January 11th, 2005 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for drug content, sexual material, language, crude humor and some violence.
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Without a Paddle
Plot point: Corrupt Cops, Death of a Best Friend, Funeral Reunions, Narcotics, Treasure Hunters
Social setting: Camping
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
